title: REanimate
description: Adds vanilla-like animations and spices up some item textures
body:
Tweaks every tool's texture and adds slight animations for items for a vanilla+ experience. Can be sorta used as a combat texturepack but it works better in vanilla-like environment with other block texturepacks.



_**Makes your inventory feel a bit more alive**_

WHAT IT DOES:
changes every tool texture:

## Most of the items in a chest:
![Most of the items in a chest:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64be7a4f1fa161c85d1ffc3ea92f1eaf775e19f9.webp)

wooden items:
makes them feel like literal sticks, with leaves still present on them.

stone items:
retextured to feel VERY roughly-made.

copper items:
changes the shape and color palette (just a bit).

iron items:
adds glint.

golden items:
changes shape and adds glint.

diamond items:
adds shiny glint.

netherite items:
adds a small string, which is much better seen in third person.



and makes many materials animated as well (where it seems reasonable)

![Spear item icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ec2be71e6b1ded0cd0dccf664fff9db895778f5.png)

Includes spear textures from my other texture pack, **reSpearite** (Spear Resprite)
